## GOALS
- Build strength and muscle
Additional details: Maintain strength and muscle mass for healthy aging. Joint health, mobility, stay athletic. Long-term health focus, no specific timeline.

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 3

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: Former college basketball player. Lifted on/off for 20 years, consistent last 3 years. Focused on healthy aging and sustainable training.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: Commercial gym
- Setup details: YMCA - standard commercial gym equipment
- Available equipment: barbells, Dumbbells, machines, cables

### Constraints
- Arthritis in right shoulder, previous meniscus surgery (left knee). Needs longer warm-up. Avoids heavy overhead pressing and max effort lifts.

### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Tom Anderson  
- **Age:** 51  
- **Gender:** Male  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — former college basketball player; lifted on/off ~20 years, **consistent last 3 years** with a healthy-aging/sustainable training focus.

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):**
  - Build and maintain **strength and muscle** for healthy aging (no specific deadline).
- **Secondary goals:**
  - **Joint health** (especially right shoulder, left knee)
  - Improved/maintained **mobility**
  - Stay **athletic** and train sustainably long-term
- **Target events/deadlines:** None specified.

---

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- **Desired training frequency:** **3 sessions/week**
- **Available training days:** Not specified (TBD)
- **Session duration preferences/constraints:** Not specified (TBD)
- **Time windows:** Not specified (TBD)
- **Blocked days:** Not specified

### Equipment & Environment
- **Primary location:** Commercial gym (**YMCA**)
- **Available equipment:** Barbells, dumbbells, machines, cables (standard commercial gym setup)

### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** Right shoulder arthritis — **avoid heavy overhead pressing**; prioritize joint-friendly pressing variations; longer warm-up required (**since 2026-02-27**). Monitor and reassess.
- **[ACTIVE]** History of left knee meniscus surgery — manage knee loading/volume/intensity; longer warm-up required (**since 2026-02-27**). Monitor and reassess.
- **[ACTIVE]** Avoids **max-effort lifts** (training approach constraint) to support sustainability/joint health (**since 2026-02-27**).

### Preferences
- **Training style:** Sustainable, long-term health focused; strength + hypertrophy emphasis without maxing out
- **Movement preferences:** Not specified beyond avoiding heavy overhead pressing
- **Focus areas:** Joint health (shoulder/knee), mobility, athleticism

---

## METRICS
*(No performance/body composition metrics provided yet — capture baseline when available.)*

**Strength (as of 2026-02-27)**
- Not provided (TBD): key lifts (e.g., squat/hinge/press/pull variations that are shoulder/knee-friendly)

**Movement Quality (as of 2026-02-27)**
- Not formally assessed; noted need for longer warm-ups; joint considerations: right shoulder arthritis, post-meniscus left knee history

**Body Composition (as of 2026-02-27)**
- Weight/BF%: Not provided (TBD)

**Endurance (as of 2026-02-27)**
- Not provided (TBD)

---

## LOG

## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (goals, context, constraints captured)
- Set primary goal: build/maintain strength and muscle for healthy aging; secondary goals include joint health, mobility, staying athletic
- Training frequency preference recorded: **3x/week**
- Environment recorded: **YMCA commercial gym** (barbells, dumbbells, machines, cables)
- Constraints recorded as **ACTIVE**: right shoulder arthritis (avoid heavy overhead pressing), left knee meniscus surgery history, avoids max-effort lifting; longer warm-ups required
- Metrics not yet provided; baseline testing/initial numbers marked TBD
